query:
ALTER TABLE `users`
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `tenantId` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 AFTER `id`,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `fullName` text NULL AFTER `role`,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `shippingAddress` text NULL AFTER `fullName`,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `avatarUrl` text NULL AFTER `shippingAddress`,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `lineId` varchar(128) NULL AFTER `avatarUrl`,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `googleId` varchar(128) NULL AFTER `lineId`,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `passwordHash` varchar(255) NULL AFTER `googleId`,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `permissions` json NULL AFTER `status`;

ALTER TABLE `users`
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `tenantId` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 AFTER `id`,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `fullName` text NULL AFTER `role`,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `shippingAddress` text NULL AFTER `fullName`,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `avatarUrl` text NULL AFTER `shippingAddress`,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `lineId` varchar(128) NULL AFTER `avatarUrl`,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `googleId` varchar(128) NULL AFTER `lineId`,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `passwordHash` varchar(255) NULL AFTER `googleId`,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `permissions` json NULL AFTER `status`;
